refined_caption: The hospital bathroom appears to be unhygienic and dirty, with visible issues. A toilet and radiator are present in the bathroom.
complaint_description: I was shocked to see the state of the hospital bathroom, it was dirty and unhygienic. The toilet and surrounding areas were not clean, and it looked like they had not been properly maintained. This is unacceptable for a healthcare facility.
voice_text: The hospital bathroom is really dirty and unhygienic, I saw a dirty toilet and it looks like it hasn't been cleaned in a while.
